title: Three-layer geography atlas
source_observation: Literary historical and production geography carry different levels of certainty
risk: One clean map could silently convert narrative relationships into archaeological fact
decision: Maintain separate textual historical and production maps with confidence levels and visible uncertainty
rationale: Protects scholarly traceability while supporting production planning
required_review: Cartography; classical Tamil; archaeology; production design

title: No proven Manipallavam identification
source_observation: Manipallavam has been associated with northern Sri Lanka and often with Nainativu but direct identification remains unresolved
risk: Publicity and concept art could describe a hypothesis as discovery
decision: Do not label Nainativu or any modern island as the proven Manipallavam
rationale: Preserves the difference between contextual plausibility and site identification
required_review: Classical Tamil; Sri Lankan archaeology; historical geography; publicity review

title: Northern Sri Lankan island-zone hypothesis
source_observation: Northern Sri Lanka contains island maritime Buddhist urban and trade contexts relevant to the epic
risk: A wholly invented fantasy island would discard regional evidence while copying one modern island would overclaim certainty
decision: Design Manipallavam from a northern Sri Lankan low-island environmental zone without duplicating one modern settlement or shrine
rationale: Creates material credibility while retaining sacred and geographical uncertainty
required_review: Island geology; ecology; Sri Lankan archaeology; community consultation; production design

title: No modern ethnic mapping of Naga
source_observation: The epic uses Naga in dynastic territorial sacred and maritime narratives
risk: Casting or design could racialize the term or merge it with unrelated modern peoples
decision: Represent Naga identity through relationships institutions maritime knowledge and source-supported symbolism rather than race makeup or modern ethnic equivalence
rationale: Avoids anachronism and politically harmful simplification
required_review: Classical Tamil; Sri Lankan history; anthropology; casting; sensitivity review

title: Karur Amaravati as provisional Vanji anchor
source_observation: Karur has Chera Vanchi inscriptional trade and archaeological associations
risk: Treating Karur as unquestionable could erase competing literary and historical interpretations
decision: Use Karur Amaravati as the principal production anchor while logging alternative Vanchi hypotheses and avoiding exclusivist claims
rationale: Provides a defensible inland Chera environment without overstating certainty
required_review: Chera history; archaeology; classical Tamil; production design

title: Distinct travel grammars
source_observation: The epic includes walking overland journeys merchant ships divine transport and previous-birth memory
risk: One montage language would erase physical stakes and make sacred travel resemble superhero movement
decision: Give each travel mode a distinct relationship to time sound fatigue navigation costume wear and bodily control
rationale: Clarifies geography and protects character continuity
required_review: Screenplay; editing; sound; costume continuity; VFX

title: No exact ancient distance claims
source_observation: Translations and commentaries may preserve numerical distances in variable ancient units
risk: A fixed kilometre conversion could manufacture a false coordinate and voyage time
decision: Approve no exact distance or duration until original Tamil editions unit variability and nautical plausibility are reviewed
required_review: Philology; historical metrology; nautical history; publicity review

title: Seasonal and transshipment sea logic
source_observation: Northern Sri Lankan waters include shallow channels while merchant movement depended on wind route knowledge and vessel draft
risk: Straight-line routes and direct beach landings by all vessel types would make the maritime world implausible
decision: Use seasonal waiting offshore anchorage transfer craft and pilot knowledge where supported while labelling the exact route as reconstruction
rationale: Connects the geography dossier to the vessel-class system
required_review: Marine archaeology; oceanography; naval architecture; stunt marine unit

title: Public maps must display uncertainty
source_observation: Several narrative places have supported regions but unresolved exact locations
risk: Marketing maps may remove caveats for visual simplicity
decision: Use solid anchors shaded regions alternative outlines and palaeoshoreline warnings in every public-facing historical map
rationale: Makes uncertainty part of the project's trust standard
required_review: Cartography; historians; legal and publicity review

title: No archaeological ownership claims
source_observation: Northern Sri Lankan sites are embedded in contested modern Tamil Sinhala Buddhist and national narratives
risk: The production could unintentionally use ancient evidence to validate exclusive modern territorial claims
decision: Record contested interpretations consult multiple communities and refuse exclusive ownership conclusions not supported by evidence
rationale: Prevents the adaptation from weaponizing archaeology
required_review: Sri Lankan historians; archaeologists; Tamil and Sinhala community consultation; ethics review
